summary: Fixed blank window bug after saving API key. Root causes: missing ErrorBoundary, no error handling in store, race condition in save/fetch, no crash recovery. Added ErrorBoundary component, wrapped App with error boundary, added try/catch to all store async operations, fixed SettingsPanel race condition with delay and error handling, added renderer crash handlers in main process.
current_status: Application rebuilt and launched - Fixes applied and ready for testing
bugs_fixed: Blank window after API key save - ErrorBoundary now catches crashes
No error handling in store - All async operations now wrapped in try/catch
Race condition in save/fetch - Added delay and proper sequencing
No crash recovery - Main process now auto-reloads renderer on crash
next_steps: Test API key save to confirm fix works
